image.alt: Marble bust of a young clean-shaven ancient Mediterranean ruler with tousled hair, against a warm ochre wall

attribution.fileTitle: File:Bust of Alexander the Great in Musei Capitolini.jpg
attribution.author: Livioandronico2013

rounds.revealFact: Alexander the Great built one of the largest empires of the ancient world by his early thirties.

image.alt: Painting of sailing warships engulfed in cannon smoke on the open sea

attribution.fileTitle: File:The Battle of Trafalgar by William Clarkson Stanfield.jpg
attribution.author: Clarkson Frederick Stanfield

clues: An admiral broke with standard naval tactics, sailing his fleet directly into the enemy line rather than alongside it.
The admiral was fatally wounded by a sniper's shot but lived long enough to hear of the victory.

pairs.a: The Rosetta Stone is discovered near Rosetta, Egypt
pairs.b: Charles Darwin publishes On the Origin of Species

pairs.a: The American Civil War begins at Fort Sumter
pairs.b: The transcontinental railroad is completed in the United States

pairs.a: Thomas Edison patents the practical incandescent light bulb
pairs.b: Alfred Nobel establishes the Nobel Prize in his will

pairs.a: Henry Ford introduces the moving assembly line
pairs.b: The Treaty of Versailles ends the First World War

pairs.a: Vasco da Gama reaches India by an all-sea route
pairs.b: Ferdinand Magellan's expedition completes the first circumnavigation of the globe

image.alt: A crowd of people with luggage waiting inside a large hall with tall arched windows

eventQuestion.prompt: What is shown in this photograph?
options: Refugees at a European train station

followUpQuestion.prompt: Which city's harbor is Ellis Island in?

rounds.prompt: A plague pandemic arrives in Europe aboard trade ships from the Black Sea.
rounds.revealFact: The Black Death killed an estimated third of Europe's population over the following years.

rounds.prompt: Where was one of the Achaemenid Persian Empire's ceremonial capitals, favored as a winter residence?
rounds.revealFact: Susa served the Achaemenid kings for centuries and later appears in the biblical Book of Esther as Shushan.
